items.title: [THN Webinar] New AI DDoS Attacks Are Smarter. Learn How to Fight Back
items.summary:
Every single day, hackers are finding new ways to crash websites and steal data.

But right now, something has changed. Hackers are no longer working alone. They are now using powerful Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools...

items.title: cdk8s-plus-34 2.0.18
items.summary: cdk8s+ is a software development framework that provides high level abstractions for authoring Kubernetes applications. cdk8s-plus-34 synthesizes Kubernetes manifests for Kubernetes 1.34.0

items.title: Microsoft Defender can now automatically isolate hacked endpoints
items.summary: Microsoft is testing a new Defender for Endpoint capability that will automatically isolate compromised endpoints to thwart attackers' attempts to move laterally across the network. [...]
